name: PlanetRecipes
title: Planet Recipes
author: David K Carlson
description:
Only shows recipes that are specific to the current planet.

How to use: Click the button in the Shortcut Bar in game (bottom right) to bring up the window with the recipes for the planets.

Why: When going to a new planet, some people find it difficult to find or remember recipes that are specific to the planet (e.g. Vulcanus).
